For design professionals

Designed exclusively for architects and interior designers: discover the Professional Program – your gateway to samples, inspiration, and tailored support.

Discover the Professional Program Request a Sample

Obsessed
with details

Exclusively for architects and interior designers

At FORMANI, we understand the challenges architects and interior designers face when translating vision into reality. That is why we created the Professional Program – a dedicated initiative designed to support you with more than just products. What makes this program unique is the breadth of services we bring together exclusively for design professionals: tailored guidance, access to inspiration, technical resources, and the ability to experience our hardware firsthand.

Designed for your practice

  • Quick access to samples, catalogues, and technical documents

  • Direct support from our team - we have partners worldwide - to assist you throughout your project journey. 

  • Insights, inspiration, and resources curated specifically for design professionals

  • Priority updates on collections, finishes, and innovations

How to join
Participation is simple: register for the Professional Program via the form below. After a short screening to ensure the program aligns with your professional practice, you will gain access to available tools and services.

Sample Program

Discover FORMANI firsthand

Sample program

At FORMANI, obsessed with details is more than a motto – it’s something to experience. With our Sample Program, you can see and feel how finishes and materials truly match your design vision. We encourage you to keep samples in your library, so they remain a valuable resource for future projects as well.

For professionals. No cost, no commitment.

Request sample

The FORMANI sample program significantly contributes by allowing designers and architects to explore various materials, finishes, and colors and to combine them.

- Jesseca van Haneghem, Studio Piet Boon

Experience Kit

Extend your toolkit even further

Experience kit

The Experience Kit takes you beyond our catalogue and Sample Program, offering a complete presentation in signature FORMANI style. It includes sample boxes of selected collections and a dedicated Colour Chip Box, all designed to present finishes and options in a clear and cohesive way.

To give you a complete overview, the kit contains:

Catalogue (digital or hardcopy)  

Request a free sample

Colour chip box (minimum costs involved) 

Sample box (3 variants) (minimum costs involved)  

Not sure yet?

If you’re not entirely certain about which samples or tools you need, simply join the Professional Program and decide later. As a member, you’ll have access to our full range of support, and our team will guide you in selecting the right resources whenever you’re ready.

Join the Professional Program →
